nasb.text: “If a man steals an ox or a sheep and slaughters it or sells it, he shall pay five oxen for the ox and four sheep for the sheep.

esv.text: “If a man steals an ox or a sheep, and kills it or sells it, he shall repay five oxen for an ox, and four sheep for a sheep.

cnv.text: “如果人偷了牛或是羊，無論是宰了或是賣了，他必須賠償，以五牛還一牛，以四羊還一羊。

ccb.text: “倘若有人偷了别人的牛羊，然后宰了或卖了，他要用五头牛抵偿一头牛，四只羊抵偿一只羊。
